component:
<AsyncLoader isLoading="<- green@isLoading" title="@@strings.app_install_title" subtitle="@@strings.app_install_subtitle">
<div class="fixed right-4 bottom-8 inset-x-0 flex justify-center" if="<- green@isOutdated"> <Btn icon="refresh" class="!rounded-full bg-red-700" title="@@strings.app_install_update" mode="primary" busy="<- green@isFetching" action="-> green.reload()" />
